Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $100,492,203Details
International Box Office $131,436,024
Worldwide Box Office $231,928,227
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$179,953 (0.2% of total gross)
Legs:8.19 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:8 opening theaters/2,375 max. theaters, 10.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $177,374,787

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 15th, 2004 (Limited) by Warner Bros.
January 21st, 2005 (Expands Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: February 4th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
March 10th, 2005 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: July 12th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, some disturbing images, thematic material and language.
Running Time: 132 minutes
Award nomination: 2005 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Golden Globe Winner Best Director—Motion Picture, Oscars Best Picture Winner
Plot point: Boxing
Subgenre: Sports Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
